# AI_Agent_Driven_Campus_Governance_Platform
# Working Guidelines

# Sync Before Coding: Always remember to rebase your branch before you start writing code every day.

# Naming Conventions: Use camelCase or snake_case for naming; minimize the use of Pinyin to ensure code readability.

# Smart AI Usage: Using AI tools is encouraged and supported, but you must manually verify the logic generated by the AI.

# Early Warning: If you find a task impossible to complete, please inform the team at least 2 days before the deadline. It’s okay to admit it’s out of reach—communication is key.
